# Full-Spectrum Checklist: PDF Export Pipeline

**Purpose**: Deep author self-review of requirement quality across all areas — rendering, pipeline, API, and operations
**Created**: 2026-03-29
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [api-contracts.md](../contracts/api-contracts.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md)
**Status**: All 52 items resolved (2026-03-29)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 - Are rendering specifications defined for all 10 building block types, or only the 3 with explicit visual descriptions (MusicalNotes, ChordProgression, ChordTablatureGroup)? The remaining 7 (SectionHeading, Date, Text, BulletList, NumberedList, CheckboxList, Table) lack any rendering detail. [Completeness, Spec §FR-009] → **Resolved**: FR-009 updated with "visual parity with web UI" requirement covering all 10 types.
- [x] CHK002 - Are page margin requirements specified for the PDF output? No mention of margins for any page type. [Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-007a added — no extra margins; grid maps directly to page dimensions.
- [x] CHK003 - Are font requirements specified (typeface, sizes, weights) for cover page text, index entries, module headers, and body content? [Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-009 updated — module body uses FontFamily from style; cover/index use default sans-serif.
- [x] CHK004 - Are dot color, dot size, and dot opacity specified for the dotted paper background? Only "5mm dot grid" spacing is defined. [Gap, Spec §FR-006, §FR-007] → **Resolved**: FR-006/FR-007 updated — light gray #CCCCCC, 0.5mm diameter.
- [x] CHK005 - Are requirements defined for what happens when module content overflows the module's grid bounds during PDF rendering? [Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-009a added — clip to module bounds.
- [x] CHK006 - Is the rendering order for overlapping modules specified? Modules have a ZIndex property, but the spec does not mention z-order in rendering. [Gap, Spec §FR-007] → **Resolved**: FR-007 updated — ZIndex ascending order.
- [x] CHK007 - Are requirements defined for when the index/table of contents exceeds a single page? A notebook with many lessons could produce a multi-page index. [Gap, Spec §FR-006] → **Resolved**: FR-006 updated — index continues onto subsequent pages.
- [x] CHK008 - Are requirements defined for handling duplicate lesson IDs in the CreatePdfExportRequest? [Gap, Spec §FR-022] → **Resolved**: FR-022 updated — silently deduplicated.
- [x] CHK009 - Is the cover page creation date display format specified (e.g., "March 29, 2026" vs. "2026-03-29" vs. locale-dependent)? [Gap, Spec §FR-005] → **Resolved**: FR-005 updated — locale-dependent based on user's language setting.
- [x] CHK010 - Is the owner display name format on the cover page defined (FirstName LastName? Full concatenation? Display name?)? [Gap, Spec §FR-005] → **Resolved**: FR-005 updated — FirstName LastName.
- [x] CHK011 - Are localization requirements specified for any text rendered in the PDF (cover page labels, index heading, page number format)? [Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-006 updated with localized heading; Assumptions updated.
- [x] CHK012 - Are requirements specified for the PdfFailed notification payload beyond exportId? Should a failure reason or error code be included? [Gap, Contracts §PdfFailed] → **Resolved**: FR-013a updated — includes errorCode. Contracts updated.

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK013 - Is "circular badges" for MusicalNotes quantified with specific dimensions, colors, spacing, or layout rules? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009] → **Resolved**: Covered by "visual parity with web UI" (FR-009). Detailed sizing is a frontend rendering spec concern.
- [x] CHK014 - Is "horizontal pill-shaped badges with beat counts" for ChordProgression quantified with sizing, inter-pill spacing, beat count display position, and typography? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009] → **Resolved**: Same as CHK013.
- [x] CHK015 - Is "vector fretboard diagrams" for ChordTablatureGroup specified with fret count shown, string spacing, dot/marker sizes, barre rendering, muted/open string indicators, and labeling? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009] → **Resolved**: Same as CHK013.
- [x] CHK016 - Is "exact grid position" defined with a specific grid-unit-to-millimeter conversion formula? The plan derives `widthMm / gridWidth * gridUnits` but no spec requirement states this. [Clarity, Spec §FR-007] → **Resolved**: FR-007 updated — "1 grid unit = 5mm".
- [x] CHK017 - Is "bottom corner" for page numbers specified as bottom-left, bottom-right, or bottom-center? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010] → **Resolved**: FR-010 updated — bottom-right.
- [x] CHK018 - Is "centered" on the cover page specified as both horizontally and vertically centered, or only one axis? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005] → **Resolved**: FR-005 updated — "centered horizontally and vertically".
- [x] CHK019 - Is "appropriate error" for invalid lesson IDs specified with a concrete error code and HTTP status in the spec? The contracts define INVALID_LESSON_IDS / 400, but Spec §US2-AS2 says only "appropriate error". [Clarity, Spec §US2] → **Resolved**: FR-023 updated with explicit error code `INVALID_LESSON_IDS` and 400 status.
- [x] CHK020 - Is "filename-unsafe characters sanitized" defined with a specific sanitization rule or character allowlist/blocklist? [Clarity, Assumptions §5] → **Resolved**: FR-016 updated with explicit rule: chars not in `[a-zA-Z0-9 _-.()]` replaced by `_`, truncated to 200 chars.
- [x] CHK021 - Is the cancellation behavior for deleting a Pending export defined? Does deletion guarantee the background service will not pick it up, or is there a race window? [Clarity, Spec §US3-AS3] → **Resolved**: FR-018 updated — deletion allowed in any status. FR-027 added — background service detects missing record and aborts. Edge case added.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK022 - Are error codes consistent across all artifacts? EXPORT_NOT_READY and EXPORT_EXPIRED appear in contracts §Error Codes but are not listed in spec §Functional Requirements. [Consistency, Contracts vs. Spec] → **Resolved**: FR-017 updated with both error codes explicitly.
- [x] CHK023 - Is the 24-hour expiry calculation consistently defined? FR-012 says "from completion" (CompletedAt-based), FR-021a says "from creation" (CreatedAt-based) for Failed exports. Are these two distinct rules clearly distinguished? [Consistency, Spec §FR-012 vs §FR-021a] → **Resolved**: Already clear — two distinct rules, no change needed.
- [x] CHK024 - Does the PdfExportResponse DTO contain all fields needed to satisfy US3 acceptance scenarios (specifically: does the list endpoint return enough metadata for the user to identify exports)? [Consistency, Contracts §DTOs vs. Spec §US3] → **Resolved**: DTO fields sufficient (id, notebookId, notebookTitle, status, createdAt, completedAt, lessonIds).
- [x] CHK025 - Does the download endpoint's 404 response distinguish between "not found", "not ready", and "expired" using distinct error codes, or are all three collapsed to a single 404? [Consistency, Contracts §GET /exports/{id}/download] → **Resolved**: FR-017 now explicitly uses `EXPORT_NOT_READY` and `EXPORT_EXPIRED` as distinct codes. "Not found" uses standard `NOT_FOUND`.
- [x] CHK026 - Is the existing repository method `GetActiveExportForNotebookAsync` (which includes Ready status) reconciled with the spec's Pending/Processing-only active constraint in FR-002 and FR-020? [Consistency, Gap] → **Resolved**: Repo method serves a different purpose (notebook deletion guard). No spec change needed; plan-level detail.

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK027 - Can SC-001 ("within 30 seconds for up to 50 pages") be measured without defining what constitutes a "page of content" (number of modules, content density, building block types)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001] → **Resolved**: SC-001 updated — "one LessonPage with up to 6 modules containing mixed building block types per page".
- [x] CHK028 - Can SC-002 ("100% accurately reflect module positions") be objectively verified without a position tolerance in millimeters? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002] → **Resolved**: SC-002 updated — "within 1mm tolerance".
- [x] CHK029 - Can SC-006 ("render correctly without visual defects") be objectively measured? Is "visual defect" defined anywhere? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006] → **Resolved**: SC-006 updated — "without missing content, overlapping elements, or incorrectly clipped text".
- [x] CHK030 - Is SC-005's cleanup window ("within 48 hours of expiration") testable given that the daily cleanup has no guaranteed execution time? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005] → **Resolved**: Accepted as-is. Integration tests can trigger cleanup manually with a past cutoff time.
- [x] CHK031 - Are US5 acceptance scenarios (rendering quality) testable without defining expected visual output references for each building block type? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §US5] → **Resolved**: Covered by visual parity requirement (FR-009) + refined SC-006.

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK032 - Are requirements defined for deleting an export that is currently in Processing status? Does deletion cancel the in-progress background job or only remove the record? [Coverage, Spec §FR-018] → **Resolved**: FR-018 updated — deletion allowed in any status. FR-027 added — background service detects missing record and aborts.
- [x] CHK033 - Are requirements specified for what happens when the bounded channel is full (all 50 slots occupied) and a new export is queued? Does the API block, reject, or timeout? [Coverage, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-026 added — 5-second timeout, then 503.
- [x] CHK034 - Are requirements defined for concurrent POST /exports requests for the same notebook (race condition between the conflict check and record creation)? [Coverage, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-020 updated — DB-level unique constraint as safeguard; catch constraint violation → 409.
- [x] CHK035 - Are recovery requirements defined for partial Azure Blob upload failure? Could an orphaned blob exist without a corresponding Ready record? [Coverage, Gap] → **Resolved**: No orphan risk — UploadAsync is atomic. Failure → status set to Failed. Documented in edge cases.
- [x] CHK036 - Are requirements defined for the scenario where a notebook is deleted WHILE its export is being processed by the background service? The cascade delete removes the DB record but the service may hold data in memory. [Coverage, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-028 added — handle missing data gracefully, set to Failed.
- [x] CHK037 - Are requirements specified for the polling fallback flow (when SignalR is unavailable)? Is a recommended polling interval or strategy documented? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases] → **Resolved**: Edge case updated — "every 3 seconds" (per frontend docs).
- [x] CHK038 - Are requirements specified for what happens when a user requests a partial export with ALL lesson IDs (equivalent to full export)? Should it behave identically to a null lessonIds request? [Coverage, Spec §FR-022] → **Resolved**: Treated identically to null (full export). No spec change needed — FR-022 covers this implicitly.

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK039 - Is rendering behavior specified for modules with empty ContentJson ("[]" — no building blocks)? [Edge Case, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-009a added — styled box with empty body.
- [x] CHK040 - Is the behavior specified for very long notebook titles that exceed OS filename length limits (e.g., 255 characters)? [Edge Case, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-016 updated — truncate to 200 chars. Edge case added.
- [x] CHK041 - Are requirements defined for building blocks with empty or minimal data (empty BulletList, Table with zero rows, Text with empty string)? [Edge Case, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-009a added — empty blocks skipped.
- [x] CHK042 - Is rendering behavior specified for chord building blocks that reference a chord ID not found in the database (orphaned reference)? [Edge Case, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-009b added — placeholder with DisplayName.
- [x] CHK043 - Is rendering behavior specified for modules at the minimum allowed grid size (e.g., 3x2) that may have content too large to fit? [Edge Case, Gap] → **Resolved**: Covered by FR-009a — clip to module bounds.

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK044 - Are memory consumption requirements or limits specified for PDF generation of large notebooks (e.g., 100+ pages, many chord diagrams)? [Non-Functional, Gap] → **Resolved**: Assumption added — targets up to 200 pages, best-effort beyond.
- [x] CHK045 - Are observability requirements specified (structured logging, metrics, tracing) for the export pipeline? [Non-Functional, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-030 added — log lifecycle events with export ID, user ID, and duration.
- [x] CHK046 - Are retry requirements specified for transient Azure Blob Storage failures during upload or download? [Non-Functional, Gap] → **Resolved**: Assumption added — no retry, single attempt, mark Failed on failure.
- [x] CHK047 - Is the background service's concurrency model explicitly specified — sequential (one export at a time) or parallel? [Non-Functional, Gap] → **Resolved**: Sequential processing (single channel reader). Plan-level detail, no spec change needed.
- [x] CHK048 - Are graceful shutdown requirements defined for the background service (complete in-progress export vs. re-queue vs. abandon)? [Non-Functional, Gap] → **Resolved**: FR-029 added — complete current job, stop picking up new ones.

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK049 - Is the assumption "cover page does not count in page numbering" documented as an explicit requirement or only as an assumption? Should it be promoted to an FR? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions §1] → **Resolved**: Promoted to FR-005 ("cover page is unnumbered") and FR-010 ("cover page excluded from numbering"). Removed from assumptions.
- [x] CHK050 - Is the assumption "PDF page size matches notebook PageSize" derived from an explicit functional requirement, or is it only inferred? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions §4] → **Resolved**: Promoted to FR-007a. Removed from assumptions.
- [x] CHK051 - Are QuestPDF Community license limitations (e.g., document size caps, watermarking thresholds) documented as a constraint? [Dependency, Gap] → **Resolved**: QuestPDF Community has no revenue/size restrictions since v2024.3. No constraint needed.
- [x] CHK052 - Is the relationship between building block JSON structure in ContentJson and the rendering requirements formally linked? Are the JSON schemas for each block type referenced or embedded? [Dependency, Gap] → **Resolved**: Building block classes in DomainModels/BuildingBlocks/ serve as the JSON schemas. Visual parity requirement (FR-009) links rendering to frontend spec.

## Notes

- All 52 items resolved on 2026-03-29 via QnA session.
- 18 items auto-resolved from codebase research.
- 34 items resolved through 7 user questions (all accepted with recommended defaults).
- Spec updated with 10 new FRs (FR-007a, FR-009a, FR-009b, FR-026–FR-030), 11 updated FRs, 10 new edge cases, refined success criteria, and updated assumptions.
